summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Field Force Solutions field service management platform. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate), frontend navigation and core features working properly.

ui_bugs.issue: JWT token expiration causing quick session timeouts during extended UI testing

passed_tests: Backend API - User registration and login (100% success)
Backend API - Customer CRUD operations (create, get, delete)
Backend API - Quote CRUD operations with public portal access
Backend API - Invoice CRUD operations with Stripe payment integration
Backend API - Team management and analytics
Frontend - Login page loads and displays correct branding
Frontend - Dashboard access after successful login
Frontend - Sidebar navigation with all required items (Dashboard, Customers, Quotes, Invoices, Jobs)
Frontend - Page navigation between Customers, Quotes, Invoices pages
Frontend - Add/Create functionality buttons present and accessible
Frontend - Branding verification (Field Force Solutions, not FieldOps Pro)
